title: Causes the wind to be in your favor on field goals.
Crossed The Line - allows the QB to pass even after crossing the line of scrimmage
Extra Credit - gives you 4 points for each interception you get, and 3 points for each time you sack the opposing QB
Gives you unlimited time outs for one game.
Improves your player's pass catching ability for one game.
Increases the opponent's chance of getting injured.
Increases your player's chances of getting an interception.
Increases your QB's accuracy for one game.
Increases your team's pass rush on defense for one game.
Pennant #204 - Butter Fingers. This pennant increases your opponent's chances of fumbling for one game.
Pennant #209 - Hurricane. Improves your team's pass rush on defense for one game.
Pennant #210 - Instant Freplay. This pennant gives your team 5 downs instead of 4 to make a first down.
Pennant #212 - Molasses. Increases your opponent's fatigue factor for one game.
Pennant #213 - Nike Free. Increases your ability to break tackles for one game.
QB Dud - causes your opponent's passes to be high and wobbly
Steel Toe - greatly increases the kick power of your kicker and punter
Super Dive - greatly increases the range of dives
Thread & Needle - narrows the uprights when your opponent attempts a field goal or conversion
Tough As Nails - decreases the chances that your quarterback will be sacked if hit behind the line of scrimmage
Trip - Increases the likelihood that your defensive backs will jam the opposing recievers at the line of scrimmage
